name: @peerbot/worker
description: Ephemeral worker that runs Claude Code sessions in Kubernetes Jobs

scripts.build: tsc && cp src/custom-instructions.md dist/ && tsc mcp/process-manager-server.ts --outDir dist/mcp --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --allowImportingTsExtensions false --downlevelIteration --skipLibCheck && cp dist/mcp/process-manager-server.js dist/mcp/process-manager-server.mjs
